_comment: Project-scoped hooks for synapsis memory hygiene. Requires trusting this project once (see /hooks or add to ~/.grok/trusted-hook-projects). Uses the new 'synapsis hygiene' CLI (dry consolidate + stats by default).

hooks.command: uv run python -m tools.synapsis hygiene 2>/dev/null || true
uv run python -m tools.synapsis hygiene 2>/dev/null || true
uv run python -m tools.synapsis hygiene 2>/dev/null || true
